onboarding.actions.installExtensionAria: Install the Octo browser extension and open Chrome Web Store
onboarding.intro.actions.skipAria: Skip onboarding and enter the main page
onboarding.intro.hero.subtitle: Where humans and AI Agents work as one team
onboarding.intro.hero.title: Octo is an AI-native collaboration platform
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.descri: Work context stays protected, traceable, and ready for Agents to act on.
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.title: Context
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.descripti: Open source and self-hostable, so your data stays under your control.
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.title: Open
Humans, AI Agents, and tools coordinate through one collaboration layer.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.descript: AI can think and execute; humans bring taste, judgment, and lived context.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.title: Taste
onboarding.sections.createBot.descriptio: Create your first Bot in BotFather and start using Octo.
onboarding.sections.createBot.label: Create your Bot
onboarding.sections.createBot.title: Create your Bot
onboarding.sections.createBot.visualTitl: Cursor hovering over the BotFather entry
onboarding.sections.browserExtension.des:
Octo stays beside your current page.
Keep using GitHub, Feishu Docs, and more while working with your team and AI in Octo.
onboarding.sections.favorites.descriptio:
Your shortcut to important work.
Keep key customers, projects, and active tasks easy to find.
onboarding.sections.favorites.label: Favorites
onboarding.sections.favorites.title: Keep key work in Favorites
onboarding.sections.groupMd.description:
Define how the channel works.
Owners put goals, key resources, and rules in GROUP.md.
New members and AI read it before they begin.
onboarding.sections.groupMd.label: GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.groupMd.title: Set channel rules in GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.descrip:
Clear up the context.
AI Summary surfaces key decisions and open questions from long discussions.
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.label: AI Summary
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.title: Summarize multiple chats at once
onboarding.sections.subspaces.descriptio:
Focus on one problem at a time.
Open a subspace for a task instead of searching through chat.
You, your team, and your AI stay focused on the same work.
onboarding.sections.subspaces.label: Subspaces
onboarding.sections.subspaces.title: Move tasks into subspaces
onboarding.sections.webhook.description:
External systems notify Octo as events happen.
Connect GitHub, alerting tools, and more to send new events to Octo.
onboarding.sections.webhook.label: Webhook
onboarding.sections.webhook.title: Get key updates via Webhook
onboarding.sections.workspace.descriptio:
Chat as usual. Octo keeps work beyond the message stream.
People, resources, rules, and AI share one workspace.
Your AI works from the same context.
onboarding.sections.workspace.label: Workspace
onboarding.sections.workspace.title: How Octo organizes work
